backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the game backend with player profiles, community levels, leaderboards, and role-based access control using a MixinAuthorization pattern.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping implemented feature IDs to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs for Internet Identity auth, game engine, prebuilt levels, and level editor features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short one-line summaries for each frontend source file, documenting purpose and notable fixes per file.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, borders, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes (levels, play, editor, community, leaderboard) and a shared layout with header, footer, and profile setup modal.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog shown to newly authenticated users to set a username, which is then saved to the backend as an initial PlayerProfile.
frontend/src/components/community/Rating: A modal dialog component that lets users rate a level with a 1–5 star selector, submitting the rating via the `useRateLevel` mutation hook and showing a confirmation message on success.
frontend/src/components/editor/EditorCan: A canvas-based level editor component that renders a scrollable tile grid and handles mouse events for placing or erasing tiles, drawing each tile type (ground, spike, jump pad, deco, ceiling) with distinct shapes and colors.
frontend/src/components/editor/EditorCon: A toolbar component for the level editor providing undo/redo, play-test, clear, and publish actions, with a publish dialog that requires authentication and a level title before submitting the grid via `usePublishLevel`.
frontend/src/components/editor/TilePalet: A sidebar palette component that displays clickable tile type buttons (erase, ground, spike, jump pad, deco, ceiling) with SVG previews, highlighting the currently selected tile.
A canvas-based game engine component implementing a Geometry Dash–style runner with gravity, jumping, collision detection, sprite rendering, and camera scrolling, exposing completion and death callbacks.
frontend/src/components/game/LevelComple: An overlay screen displayed when a level is completed, showing the player's score and attempt count along with buttons to proceed to the next level, retry, or return to the level list.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: Renders the sticky app header with navigation links, logo, and an authentication button that handles Internet Identity login/logout, also displaying the logged-in user's username.
frontend/src/components/PixelButton.tsx: Reusable pixel-art styled button component supporting multiple color variants (green, orange, pink, red, cyan) and three sizes.
frontend/src/components/PixelCard.tsx: Reusable pixel-art styled card container component with default, neon, orange, and pink border/shadow variants.
frontend/src/data/prebuiltLevels.ts: Defines tile type constants, the PrebuiltLevel interface, and three hardcoded levels (easy, medium, hard) with spike/platform/jump-pad placements encoded as JSON grid strings.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, persisting identity across reloads and exposing login/clear functions with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, community level publishing/rating/deletion, leaderboard queries, and play count tracking.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports pixel fonts, defines OKLCH CSS custom properties for a neon retro theme, and declares reusable Tailwind component classes like pixel-border and pixel-btn variants.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single cn utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityHubPage.tsx: Displays a grid of community-created levels with play counts, star ratings, and delete controls for owners. Fetches levels via React Query hooks and navigates to the game page on play.
frontend/src/pages/GamePage.tsx: Renders the active game session using GameEngine for either prebuilt or community levels, handling level completion, score submission, play count incrementing, profile updates, and an optional post-game rating dialog.
frontend/src/pages/LeaderboardPage.tsx: Shows a ranked leaderboard for a selected level (prebuilt or community), highlighting the current user's entry and formatting scores and timestamps in a pixel-art style.
frontend/src/pages/LevelEditorPage.tsx: Provides a tile-based level editor with an 10×80 grid, undo/redo/clear history, a tile palette sidebar, and a play-test mode that runs the level in GameEngine without leaving the page.
frontend/src/pages/LevelSelectPage.tsx: Lists all prebuilt levels as cards with difficulty indicators, best scores, and lock state derived from the user's saved profile, navigating to the game page on selection.
frontend/src/utils/loadSprites.ts: Provides a cached image loader and helper functions for drawing cube and tile sprites from sprite sheets, plus a preloadAllSprites utility that loads all game assets in parallel.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a retro pixel-art theme with custom fonts, neon colors, zero border-radius, pixel shadows, and animations like scanlines and pixel-pulse.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor for a Geometry Dash-inspired browser platformer called 'Pixel Dash', listing existing features, architectural notes, image requirements, and versioning metadata.
